user.title: Set up DHL Shipment Tracking
user.description: Enter credentials from the DHL Developer Portal (developer.dhl.com). In production with 'Parcel DE Tracking', the DHL website API is used - no special credentials required. API key and secret are needed for sandbox mode and the Unified API.

data.api_secret: API Secret (Consumer Secret, optional for production)

data_description.api_key: Found at: developer.dhl.com -> Your App -> Authorization -> Consumer Key
data_description.api_secret: Only required for sandbox mode. Found at: Authorization -> Consumer Secret
data_description.api_type: Parcel DE Tracking recommended - works without special credentials
data_description.sandbox: Enable to use DHL test tracking numbers. Requires API key and secret.

error.invalid_api_key: Invalid API credentials - check Consumer Key

abort.already_configured: DHL Shipment Tracking is already configured

data_description.tracking_number: Full DHL tracking number without spaces
data_description.label: e.g. 'Amazon May' - used as sensor name

email_scanner.title: Email Scanner
email_scanner.description: The scanner connects via IMAP and automatically detects DHL tracking numbers in incoming emails. Note: Use an app password if 2FA is enabled. Gmail: Google Account -> Security -> App Passwords.

data_description.imap_provider: Select provider - server is filled in automatically
data_description.imap_password: For Gmail: app password from Google account settings
data_description.imap_scan_interval: How often inbox is checked (default: 300 = 5 min)

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Update interval in seconds. Minimum: 600 s (10 min).

error.invalid_tracking_number: Tracking number is too short or invalid
error.tracking_already_added: This tracking number is already being tracked
error.imap_missing_fields: Email address and password are required
